steps.title: This protocol automates the NucleoMag® RNA...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the NucleoMag® RNA kit for flexible magnetic bead based isolation of RNA from tissue and cell samples. Before beginning the protocol on the OT-2, the following preparation steps are needed. 1. Perform the lysis accoding to the NucleoMag® RNA user manual. 2. Prepare the rDNase reaction mixture according to the NucleoMag® RNA user manual. 3. Fill the 12-Well Buffer Reservoir according to the table below. 4. Resuspend the NucleoMag B-Beads by vortexing and place them in Position A1 of the 2mL Tube Rack. 5. Load the instrument deck according to the displayed positions. 6. Place the Square-well Block containing the lysates on the Magnetic Module and start the run. You can access the full descripition of this workflow on the OT-2 by visiting this link: [link](https://insights.opentrons.com/hubfs/Partners/Macherey-Nagel/NucleoMag%20RNA%20on%20OT-2%20Protocol%20Info.pdf)

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
